Fitness em São Paulo

Treine com força, flexibilidade e propósito.

Na Alonso Academia você encontra treinamento de musculação, yoga e pilates em um único lugar. Alcance seus objetivos com programas personalizados.

Comece agora
Edit
Conheça nossos serviços
Edit
Nossos serviços

Treinamento, yoga e pilates em um só lugar

Na Alonso Academia em São Paulo, você encontra tudo que precisa para transformar seu corpo e sua mente com programas completos e personalizados.

RegenerateEdit

Treinamento de força

Programas de musculação com personal trainers que adaptam cada sessão aos seus objetivos, nível e cronograma pessoal.

Yoga e pilates

Aulas de yoga e pilates que melhoram flexibilidade, postura e equilíbrio mental enquanto fortalecem seu core.

O que nossos membros dizem

Histórias reais de transformação

Ver mais depoimentos
Edit

Comecei na Alonso Academia há seis meses sem experiência. Os instrutores me guiaram com paciência e hoje consigo fazer séries que nunca imaginei. Meu corpo e confiança mudaram completamente.

RegenerateEdit

Marcus Santos

Membro de Treinamento de Força

As aulas de yoga na Alonso Academia me ajudaram a encontrar paz depois de anos de estresse. A instrutora Flávio cria um espaço verdadeiramente acolhedor onde você se sente seguro para crescer.

RegenerateEdit

Juliana Costa

Praticante de Yoga

Pilates na Alonso Academia transformou minha postura e me deu mais energia para o dia a dia. As aulas são sempre motivadoras e adaptadas ao meu nível. Recomendo para qualquer um que quer se sentir melhor.

RegenerateEdit

Ana Paula Mendes

Membra de Pilates

Frequento a Alonso Academia há mais de um ano e é incrível ver meu progresso. Flávio e toda a equipe realmente se importam com seus membros. É um lugar onde você quer voltar sempre.

RegenerateEdit

Roberto Oliveira

Membro há 1 ano

Conheça nosso espaço

Instalações modernas para seu treino

Equipamentos de última geração, ambientes arejados e estrutura completa para força, yoga e pilates em São Paulo.

Nossa história

Dedicados ao seu desenvolvimento físico

A Alonso Academia nasceu com a missão de oferecer um espaço completo onde você alcança seus objetivos através de treinamento de força, yoga e pilates, com acompanhamento personalizado.

Edit
Our Philosophy

A studio blending modern design with tradition.

We believe yoga is for everyone. Our practice goes beyond the mat, fostering a lifestyle of mindfulness, connection, and growth.

RegenerateEdit

Vision

To inspire balance and mindfulness through every movement, creating a sanctuary where stillness meets strength.

Mission

To empower our community to find inner peace and physical vitality through accessible, authentic yoga practices.

Classes

Practice options for every body and every day

RegenerateEdit

Vinyasa Flow

A dynamic practice linking breath with movement. Build heat, strength, and flexibility in this energizing flow.

RegenerateEdit

Hatha Foundations

Focus on alignment and holding postures. Perfect for beginners or those seeking a grounded, steady practice.

RegenerateEdit

Yin + Restore

Slow-paced style with deep stretches held for longer periods. Targets connective tissues and cultivates stillness.

RegenerateEdit

Breathwork + Meditation

Guided pranayama and mindfulness techniques to reduce stress, improve focus, and connect with your inner self.

RegenerateEdit

Private Sessions

Personalized instruction tailored to your unique needs and goals.

Garden

Create your dream garden with vibrant blooms.

Get Started
Edit
Get Started
Edit
Why choose us

Transform Your Outdoor Space with Expert Care

We bring years of expertise, a love for nature, and a commitment to quality to every project. Whether it's a small garden or a full landscape transformation, we ensure exceptional results.

Talk to an expert
Edit
01

Seasonal Cleanup & Landscaping

Spring and fall leaf removal, debris clearing, mulching, and small landscaping enhancements such as planting or edging beds.

02

Aeration & Overseeding

Core aeration to improve soil oxygen and water absorption, followed by overseeding to thicken the turf and repair bare patches.

RegenerateEdit
RegenerateEdit
03

Fertilization & Weed Control

Scheduled nutrient applications and targeted weed treatments to promote lush growth and prevent invasive species.

04

Garden Maintenance

Regular pruning, trimming, and upkeep to keep your garden looking its best throughout the seasons.

Expert Lawn Care

Transform Your Outdoor Space with Our Expert Lawn Care

We bring years of experience and a passion for healthy outdoor spaces. From routine lawn care to full transformations, we deliver reliable, high-quality results for every property.

Talk to an Expert
Edit

400+

Lawns restored

We've turned patchy grass into vibrant lawns for hundreds of clients.

600%

Increase in property appeal

Clients enjoy enhanced curb appeal and outdoor enjoyment after working with our landscaping team.

10k

Square feet maintained

We care for everything from small yards to large outdoor spaces.

200+

5-star reviews

Homeowners trust us for reliable service, expert guidance, and consistently beautiful results.

Our Approach

Nurturing treatments for complete wellness

From therapeutic massage to mindful meditation, each service is thoughtfully crafted to address your unique needs and guide you toward inner peace.

View All Services
Edit
Book Consultation
Edit
01

Therapeutic Massage

Deep tissue, Swedish, and hot stone therapies release tension and restore circulation. Each session is customized to your body's unique needs.

02

Guided Meditation

Daily sessions for all levels. From gentle breathing exercises to deep visualization practices. Find your center and cultivate lasting calm.

03

Energy Healing

Reiki, sound therapy, and chakra balancing clear energetic blockages and restore your natural flow of vitality and well-being.

04

Yoga Practice

From gentle restorative sessions to dynamic vinyasa flows. Expert instructors guide you through practices suited to your experience level.

How We Help

Building Career Confidence Together

RegenerateEdit

Client Stories

Real Results from Real People

Read More Success Stories
Edit

I came to Ascent feeling stuck in my career and not knowing what direction to take. Within three months, I had clarity on my goals, landed interviews at top companies, and accepted a role with a 40% salary increase.

RegenerateEdit

Jennifer Martinez

Product Manager

After being laid off, I felt lost and overwhelmed by the job search. Ascent helped me reframe my experience, polish my resume, and approach interviews with confidence. I'm now in a role I love.

RegenerateEdit

Marcus Thompson

Senior Software Engineer

I wanted to transition from teaching to corporate training but didn't know how to position myself. The coaching helped me translate my skills and I landed my dream job within two months.

RegenerateEdit

David Chen

Learning & Development Manager

Returning to work after a career break was daunting. Ascent helped me rebuild my confidence, update my skills story, and negotiate a senior role. They made me feel capable again.

RegenerateEdit

Sarah Williams

Marketing Director

I always thought executive coaching was only for C-suite leaders. Ascent showed me that investing in my career development at any level pays dividends. Best decision I've made.

RegenerateEdit

Robert Jackson

Operations Manager

Welcome

Trusted Quality Carpentry Services

From small gardens to full transformations, ensuring great results.

Get a free quote
Edit
RegenerateEdit
RegenerateEdit
Our services

Expert Carpentry for Every Corner of Your Home

From structural framing to fine finishing, we deliver skilled carpentry that combines old-world craftsmanship with modern precision. Every cut, joint, and surface is built to last.

Get a free estimate
Edit
01

Custom Cabinetry & Millwork

Handcrafted kitchen cabinets, bathroom vanities, built-in wardrobes, and architectural millwork designed to fit your space perfectly.

02

Deck & Patio Construction

Cedar, composite, and hardwood decks built for durability and beauty. Custom railings, pergolas, and outdoor living spaces included.

RegenerateEdit
RegenerateEdit
03

Framing & Structural Work

Load-bearing walls, roof framing, floor joists, and structural repairs. Code-compliant builds with engineered precision on every project.

04

Restoration & Finishing

Breathe new life into antique furniture, worn staircases, and aged trim. Expert sanding, staining, and lacquer finishing for a flawless result.

05

Trim & Molding Installation

Crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and decorative trim installed with precision. We match existing profiles or create custom designs.

06

Door & Window Carpentry

Custom door frames, window casings, and trim work. We handle installation, repair, and refinishing for both interior and exterior applications.

RegenerateEdit
Our story

Building With Purpose and Pride

For over 20 years, Oak & Grain Carpentry has been crafting beautiful, functional woodwork for homes and businesses. We believe great carpentry starts with listening to our clients and ends with work that stands the test of time.
